meaning: n.嘲笑,嘲弄的话,嘲弄的对象,愚弄,笑柄,食品v.轻蔑地说,嘲笑,嘲弄,贪吃,狼吞虎咽
examples: The scientific community did not take long to scoff at and abandon von Daniken's theory.
Scoff apple strudel and pretzels and taste test your way through the 14, 000 schnapps distilleries.
But an athletic, evolved guppy would scoff at that accomplishment, if you can consider guppies athletic.
